label: professional_details
value: Considering specializing in geriatric care after attending a seminar that highlighted the unique needs of elderly patients. Currently working part-time at a local hospital while pursuing a BSN (Bachelor of Science in Nursing). Now on fixed daytime shifts, seeking strategies to manage time effectively for studying towards BSN without burning out. Considering a shift towards becoming an infection control specialist.

label: health_and_wellness_preferences
value: Engaging in regular physical activities like yoga, gym workouts, or outdoor activities, practicing mindfulness and meditation, maintaining healthy eating habits with plant-based snacks high in protein, and considering strategies for managing rotating shifts and stress. Seeking ways to maintain balance and avoid burnout while managing a full-time BSN program and part-time work.

label: dietary_preferences
value: Decided to go fully vegetarian after reading about the benefits of a vegetarian diet for heart health and longevity. Interested in quick vegetarian snacks and meals that can be prepared in under 10 minutes, such as hummus and veggie sticks, almond butter and apple slices, roasted chickpeas, nut and seed mix, avocado toast, quinoa salad, tofu scramble, smoothie bowl, and bean and cheese quesadillas.

label: miscellaneous_information
value: Interested in strategies and techniques for maintaining patient engagement during interactive sessions, including using clear and simple language, incorporating visual aids, interactive demonstrations, encouraging questions and feedback, personalized learning, utilizing technology, gamification and quizzes, group sessions and support groups, follow-up and reinforcement, positive reinforcement, and feedback loops.

label: activity_and_service_preferences
value: Interested in apps and tools for time management and prioritization, specifically Todoist, Trello, Asana, Notion, Microsoft To Do, Google Keep, Evernote, Forest, Pomodone, RescueTime, Google Calendar, and Calendly.

label: important_personal_details
value: Recently joined a local environmental group that focuses on beach clean-ups and coastal conservation, looking to get more involved in environmental projects and organizations.

label: plans_and_intentions
value: Seeking opportunities to get more involved in healthcare-related community service through community health fairs, school health programs, senior centers, local hospitals and clinics, non-profit organizations, online webinars, social media campaigns, local government health departments, and community-based research projects. Specifically interested in connecting with local schools to offer health education sessions, including topics such as nutrition, physical activity, mental health, infection control, substance abuse prevention, sexual health, and first aid.
